rulings.Case Title: THOMAS ANDERSON ET AL VS. THOMAS AQUILINA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And For An Order Dismissing And Barring All Cross-Complaints For Equitable Indemnity Comparative Contribution, And Apportionment Of Fault
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 20, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT THOMAS AQUILINA, AQUILINA FAMILY 2001 REVOCABLE TRUST Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And For An Order Dismissing And Barring All Cross-Complaints For Equitable Indemnity Comparative Contribution, And Apportionment Of Fault GRANTED. This Court conducted the bench trial of this case. Based on what it learned in that trial, and on the written settlement agreement with the Aquilina parties, the Court GRANTS the Aquilina Defendants' Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement. In doing so, the Court does not adopt the assertions regarding the trial evidence made in the moving papers. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: HOURI PARSI VS. ROSEMARY COURT PROPERTIES, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 425.16(C)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 20, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT ROSEMARY COURT PROPERTIES, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY, THOMAS MCCORMICK Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 425.16(C) GRANTED IN FULL. Counsels' hourly rates are at or below market, and California's anti-SLAPP laws are complex. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY T JOHNSON VS. YASMIN FIROOZABADY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Yasmin Firoozabady To Consolidate Actions For Case Management, Discovery, And Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 20, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT YASMIN FIROOZABADY Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Yasmin Firoozabady To Consolidate Actions For Case Management, Discovery, And Trial DENIED. The issue of possession is properly resolved in unlawful detainer cases. Firoozabady and her counsel shall consult with SFLR 8.10 and not file any further law and motion matters in department 302. Department 501 is the proper department for law and motion matters involving real property and landlord-tenant disputes. Any matters improperly noticed in department 302 will be ordered off calendar. = (501/RBU)
